title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Amazon Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Amazon Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Amazon Logistics India! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Nagpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Amazon Logistics India:
Amazon Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
